content.en:
Ye Tian entered Xuyang Mountain, this time the Mountain Shaking Lord did not stop Ye Tian, and directly let Ye Tian enter Xuyang Mountain

On Xuyang Mountain, Ye Tian saw the white-bearded old man.

The white-bearded old man was a little surprised when he saw Ye Tian coming, and asked, "Endless Lord, have you completed my request?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took out the body of the Black Pupil Lord and said, "I have already killed a half-step Legendary Realm Lord. "

The white-bearded old man stared at the corpse of the Black Pupil Lord, saw the scenes of his past, and quickly locked on to the scene where the Black Pupil Lord was bombarded.

In the picture, a drop of water pierces his body.

"Time is the best!"

The white-bearded old man was a little surprised, he didn't expect Ye Tian to really create a time supreme technique in a short period of time~.

What a wickedness this is!

He had seen countless demonic geniuses, and even befriended the three Eternal Masters, but he had never seen a demon-evil genius like Ye Tian.

If nothing else, it is very possible for Ye Tian to become the peak Legendary Realm Lord in the future, but whether he can become an eternal master or not actually has nothing to do with talent and qualifications, no matter how fast his cultivation speed is, he cannot increase the chance of becoming an eternal master.

If you want to become a master, talent, luck, and chance are all indispensable, and talent accounts for the lowest proportion.

"Old man with white beard, have I fulfilled your request?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's done!"

The white-bearded old man did not break his promise, and took out the ancient leaves of time and space.

Airplanes!!!

A leaf containing the power of space and time appeared, as if it were perfect, and it combined the power of space and time as if it were the power of the eternal master.

At this time, the white-bearded old man said: "Actually, the greatest use of the space-time ancient leaf is to comprehend the mystery of the fusion of time and space, but the power contained in the space-time ancient leaf is too weak, so it will be improved a little bit of help, and I have already comprehended enough, it is of little use to me." "

Saying that, this space-time ancient leaf fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"Thank you, Old Man. "

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"Let's go, I hope to see you next time, you have stepped into the Legendary Realm Lord level. "

White-bearded old man.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Looking up again, I was already in the immeasurable sea at this moment.

......

Ancient leaves of time and space, river beads of time, sand and gravel of the air sea.

The three great treasures, Ye Tian has already collected them all.

Moreover, in the past few years, he has also been contemplating the blood tissue of the Supreme Legendary Body, and the comprehension of the Supreme Legendary Body has reached a very deep level.

Thus.

He was now confident enough to condense the Supreme Legendary Body, so as to impact the Legendary Lord Realm of the Transcendent Realm.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian decided.

He took out the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, the River Bead of Time, and the Sand of the Sea of Kong, and began to absorb the power of the three supreme treasures and integrate them into his eternal body.

The power of the Time River Bead and the Sky Sea Gravel was incompatible, but with the help of the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, the two powers fused together, and helped Ye Tian break the shackles of the eternal body and become a legendary body, and it was the supreme legendary body.

This process, Ye Tian deduced hundreds of millions of times, and confirmed that there would be no mistakes.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's eternal body began to transform.

The power is constantly emerging, and Ye Tian's aura is also constantly increasing.

When Ye Tian broke through, the Frostless Lord sensed it.

"The Endless Realm Lord has broken through, could it be that he has obtained the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space?"

The Frostless Lord was shocked.

The space-time ancient leaf is in the hands of the white-bearded old man, although Ye Tian has obtained an assessment of the white-bearded old man, as long as he kills the nameless half-step legendary realm, he can obtain the space-time ancient leaf, but he needs to create supreme skills!

Could it be that Ye Tian created it?

This is the supreme skill that even she hasn't created, Ye Tian has created it?

The Frostless Lord snooped and quickly confirmed

Ye Tian was indeed condensing the Supreme Legendary Body, and the aura of the Supreme Legendary Body had already emanated, and it was very likely that the condensation would be successful.

Not only did the Frostless Lord sigh, but the other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land also sensed it.

Suddenly, these Legendary Realm Lords gathered together one by one.

"Endless Lord, is this condensing the Supreme Legendary Body?"

"Yes, judging from the breath, it is indeed the supreme legendary body. "

"The Supreme Legend Body needs to collect the Time River Bead, the Sky Sea Gravel, and the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, as far as I know, the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space are only available in the hands of the White-bearded Old Man and the Eternal Master.

"That's right, I don't know how many peak Legendary Realm lords have asked the white-bearded old man for the space-time ancient leaves, but they have all been rejected by him.The Endless Lord has nothing to do with the white-bearded old man!"

"I'm still a little incredulous. "

At this time, the Frostless Lord, as the Legendary Realm Lord who knew best, said, "I'm afraid that the Endless Lord really obtained the space-time ancient leaf from the white-bearded old man. "

"What, the Endless Lord obtained the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space from the Whitebeard Old Man? Lord Longgu was shocked.

The Frostless Lord said truthfully: "The Endless Lord told me before, the white-bearded old man asked Ye Tian to kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and he gave him a space-time ancient leaf. "

............

"Kill the Half-Step Legendary Realm? Even if the Half-Step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord controls time, he can't do it. @百恒领主说道.

"Yes, it can't be done, there is only one possibility, and that is to master a supreme skill!" said Lord Longgu

Suddenly, everyone stared at the Frostless Lord.

Lord Frostless said: "I don't know, I just guess that the Endless Lord has comprehended a supreme skill, but whether it is or not, wait for the Endless Lord to break through and then ask him."

"Well, wait for him to break through, help the Dharma Protector by the way, and don't let other Legendary Realm Lords interfere!"

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

No one knew that Ye Tian was condensing the Supreme Legendary Body, so naturally there would be no Legendary Realm Lord to interfere.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian finally completed his transformation, and the eternal body became the supreme legendary body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian broke through the shackles and was promoted to the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm.

His strength continued to improve, and after a long time, Ye Tiancai really stepped into the realm of the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord.

At this moment, one by one, the Legendary Realm Lords arrived.

"I've seen you!"

Ye Tian said a simple greeting.

At this time, the Frostless Lord couldn't wait to say, "Endless Lord, have you really comprehended a supreme skill?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian directly demonstrated the supreme skill - time dripping!

After reading it, many Legendary Realm Lords were about to suspect that they had nine lives. _
